summary: Iteration 113: Backend API Testing - Admin Reset Features for Licensees and Family Members. All 12/12 tests PASSED. Verified: (1) effective-start-date update works, (2) reset-balance updates starting_amount and projections recalculate, (3) projections start from effective_start_date, (4) family member reset for starting_amount works, (5) family member reset for effective_start_date works, (6) GET /api/family/members correctly returns 403 for non-honorary_fa users, (7) simulate endpoint returns family_members for honorary_fa users, (8) admin habits CRUD works.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ PUT /api/admin/licenses/{license_id}/effective-start-date - Works correctly, validates date format
✅ POST /api/admin/licenses/{license_id}/reset-balance - Updates starting_amount and current_amount, projections recalculate with new base
✅ PUT /api/admin/family/members/{user_id}/{member_id}/reset - Works for both starting_amount and effective_start_date
✅ GET /api/family/members - Correctly requires honorary_fa license_type (403 for others)
✅ GET /api/admin/members/{user_id}/simulate - Returns family_members array for honorary_fa users
seed_data_creation: Test data was modified and then restored: Rizza's license balance was reset to $4000 then back to $5000, Maria's starting_amount was reset to $1500 then back to $2000, Maria's effective_start_date was changed to 2026-02-01 then back to 2026-01-20
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin reset features for licensees and family members are working correctly. The projections are dynamically calculated based on effective_start_date and starting_amount. Test data has been restored to original values.

test_03_get_projections_after_reset.description: GET /api/admin/licenses/{license_id}/projections - starts from 2026-01-20, uses updated starting_amount

test_04_reset_license_balance_back_to_50.description: Reset back to $5000 to restore test data

test_07_verify_family_member_projections.description: Family member projections start from updated effective_start_date

test_08_restore_family_member_data.description: Restored Maria's data to original values

test_09_family_members_403_for_non_honor.description: GET /api/family/members correctly returns 403 for non-honorary_fa users (admin)

test_10_simulate_endpoint_returns_family.description: GET /api/admin/members/{user_id}/simulate returns family_members array for honorary_fa users with Maria's data
